name: TestCaseComment
title: TestCaseComment
description: With this function within a test case a commentary can be taken over into the report. This comment can relate to a message that can also be output in the report.
The verdict of the test case is not be influenced.

parameters.name: aComment
parameters.description: Commentary to be taken over into the report.

parameters.name: aMsg
parameters.description: CAN-, GMLAN-, LIN-, MOST-, MOST-AMS- or MOST system message to be taken over into the report.

parameters.name: aRawString
parameters.description: Here you may enter any ASCII characters. They will be added to the comment in the following way: <Hex value of the given character>(<ASCII display of the given charcter>). In ASCII display special characters will be replaced by '.'.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
